ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's chosen username */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has confirmed their email */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* Optional biographical information about the user */,
  "member_since" TEXT /* Date and time when the user joined */,
  "last_seen" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last accessed the system */,
  "avatar_hash" TEXT /* Hashed file name for the user's avatar image */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "security_question" TEXT /* Security question for account recovery */,
  "security_answer" TEXT /* Hashed answer to the security question */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is locked */,
  "lock_reason" TEXT /* Reason for locking the user account */,
  "lock_time" TEXT /* The date and time when the account was locked */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts before the account is locked */,
  "two_factor_auth_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if two-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  "two_factor_auth_secret" TEXT /* Secret key for two-factor authentication */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* JSON object to store user privacy settings */,
  "locale" TEXT /* User's preferred language and locale */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* User's preferred timezone */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* The date and time when the user last changed their password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role and its permissions */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store detailed permissions for each role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the user when the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_resets" (
  "reset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user requesting the password reset */,
  "token" TEXT /* Unique token used for the password reset process */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration time for the password reset token */,
  "is_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the token has been used */,
  "is_expired" INTEGER /* Indicates if the token has expired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_resets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "email_confirmations" (
  "confirmation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email confirmation request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user confirming their email */,
  "token" TEXT /* Unique token used for the email confirmation process */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration time for the email confirmation token */,
  "is_confirmed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the email has been confirmed */,
  "confirmation_time" TEXT /* The date and time when the email was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confirmation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_email_confirmations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "avatars" (
  "avatar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each avatar image */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who uploaded the avatar */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the avatar image is stored */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the avatar was uploaded */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the avatar file in MB */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the avatar is the default avatar */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the avatar is public or private */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* The file type of the avatar */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avatar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_avatars_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)
